roles.title: Backend Role
roles.jd: Hiring pattern: build scalable backend APIs, microservices, and data layers. Must-have: Python, SQL, API design, Docker. Good-to-have: Kubernetes, Redis, test automation. Preferred evidence: production deployments, performance tuning, reliability improvements.

roles.title: Data Engineer Role
roles.jd: Hiring pattern: design and maintain modern data pipelines for analytics and ML. Must-have: SQL, ETL, workflow orchestration, cloud data stack. Good-to-have: Spark, dbt, Redshift, data quality controls. Preferred evidence: batch + real-time pipeline ownership and measurable data latency/quality gains.

roles.title: Machine Learning Engineer Role
roles.jd: Hiring pattern: build, evaluate, and deploy ML models to production. Must-have: Python, model training, feature engineering, experimentation. Good-to-have: MLOps, model monitoring, API deployment. Preferred evidence: business impact from model performance, inference optimization, and robust pipelines.

roles.title: Product Manager Role
roles.jd: Hiring pattern: lead product discovery to delivery with cross-functional teams. Must-have: roadmap planning, requirement clarity, stakeholder communication, KPI ownership. Good-to-have: experimentation, pricing/packaging, go-to-market alignment. Preferred evidence: feature outcomes, user growth, and retention improvements.

roles.title: Frontend Engineer Role
roles.jd: Hiring pattern: build high-quality web interfaces with strong UX and performance. Must-have: React, TypeScript, component architecture, API integration. Good-to-have: state management, testing, accessibility. Preferred evidence: faster page performance, reduced UI defects, and reusable design systems.

roles.title: DevOps Engineer Role
roles.jd: Hiring pattern: automate infrastructure, deployments, and platform reliability. Must-have: CI/CD, cloud infrastructure, IaC, monitoring. Good-to-have: Kubernetes operations, security hardening, cost optimization. Preferred evidence: reduced deployment time, incident reduction, and higher uptime.

roles.title: QA Engineer Role
roles.jd: Hiring pattern: ensure software quality through scalable test strategy. Must-have: test planning, regression suites, API/UI test automation. Good-to-have: CI integration, performance testing, defect analytics. Preferred evidence: escaped defect reduction and faster release confidence.

roles.title: Data Analyst Role
roles.jd: Hiring pattern: convert business questions into data-backed decisions. Must-have: SQL analysis, dashboarding, KPI reporting, insight communication. Good-to-have: experimentation, forecasting, stakeholder storytelling. Preferred evidence: decisions influenced and measurable business impact.

roles.title: Android Developer Role
roles.jd: Hiring pattern: build stable Android apps with maintainable architecture. Must-have: Kotlin, Android SDK, MVVM, API integration. Good-to-have: Firebase, testing, release pipeline. Preferred evidence: crash-rate improvements, app performance gains, and Play Store release ownership.

roles.title: iOS Developer Role
roles.jd: Hiring pattern: develop and optimize iOS applications with clean architecture. Must-have: Swift, UIKit/SwiftUI, API integration, app lifecycle understanding. Good-to-have: testing, CI/CD, modularization. Preferred evidence: app stability improvements and user experience enhancements.

roles.title: UI UX Designer Role
roles.jd: Hiring pattern: design user-centered experiences from discovery to handoff. Must-have: research, wireframing, prototyping, usability thinking. Good-to-have: design systems, accessibility, analytics-driven iteration. Preferred evidence: conversion/usability uplift and strong collaboration with product/engineering.

roles.title: Business Analyst Role
roles.jd: Hiring pattern: translate business needs into clear technical requirements. Must-have: requirement gathering, documentation, process analysis, stakeholder alignment. Good-to-have: SQL analysis, KPI frameworks, agile delivery support. Preferred evidence: process efficiency gains and successful project outcomes.

roles.title: Full Stack Engineer Role
roles.jd: Hiring pattern: build end-to-end web products across frontend and backend. Must-have: React or equivalent, backend API development, database fundamentals. Good-to-have: cloud deployment and test automation. Preferred evidence: shipped features with measurable user or performance impact.

roles.title: Cloud Engineer Role
roles.jd: Hiring pattern: design and operate cloud-first infrastructure. Must-have: cloud platform expertise, infrastructure as code, security basics. Good-to-have: container orchestration and cost optimization. Preferred evidence: resilient architectures and reduced cloud spend.

roles.title: Site Reliability Engineer Role
roles.jd: Hiring pattern: improve reliability, availability, and incident response. Must-have: monitoring, automation, production debugging. Good-to-have: capacity planning and chaos testing. Preferred evidence: improved uptime and lower MTTR.

roles.title: Security Engineer Role
roles.jd: Hiring pattern: secure applications and infrastructure by design. Must-have: vulnerability assessment, access controls, and risk mitigation. Good-to-have: security automation and compliance tooling. Preferred evidence: reduced security incidents and faster remediation.

roles.title: Cybersecurity Analyst Role
roles.jd: Hiring pattern: monitor threats and respond to security events. Must-have: alert triage, incident documentation, and security analytics. Good-to-have: malware analysis and playbook automation. Preferred evidence: improved detection quality and response time.

roles.title: Network Engineer Role
roles.jd: Hiring pattern: design and support enterprise network systems. Must-have: routing/switching fundamentals and network troubleshooting. Good-to-have: automation and cloud networking. Preferred evidence: reduced downtime and improved network performance.

roles.title: Systems Engineer Role
roles.jd: Hiring pattern: maintain reliable system infrastructure and platforms. Must-have: OS administration, scripting, and operational support. Good-to-have: automation and cloud migration. Preferred evidence: system stability improvements and incident reduction.

roles.title: Database Administrator Role
roles.jd: Hiring pattern: manage and optimize production databases. Must-have: backup/recovery, query tuning, and availability practices. Good-to-have: automation and cloud DB services. Preferred evidence: reduced query latency and higher DB reliability.

roles.title: Data Scientist Role
roles.jd: Hiring pattern: derive predictive insights from data and experiments. Must-have: statistical reasoning, model development, and communication. Good-to-have: deployment collaboration and A/B testing depth. Preferred evidence: measurable model-driven business outcomes.

roles.title: Business Intelligence Developer Role
roles.jd: Hiring pattern: build trustworthy dashboards and reporting layers. Must-have: BI tooling, semantic modeling, and stakeholder alignment. Good-to-have: performance optimization and governance. Preferred evidence: adoption of dashboards and decision impact.

roles.title: MLOps Engineer Role

roles.title: AI Engineer Role

roles.title: Computer Vision Engineer Role

roles.title: Prompt Engineer Role

roles.title: Game Developer Role
